response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience with strong skills in performance optimization, low-latency systems, and hardware-adjacent programming (e.g., DLang, C++). However, his background is primarily in web/mobile systems and AI-agent infrastructure rather than SoC/IP modeling, deep-learning workload optimization, or AI accelerator hardware architecture. His lack of direct experience with GPU/SIMD/MIMD architectures and hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators significantly weakens his fit for this role.
strengths: Strong performance optimization experience (e.g., low-latency apps, caching, high-performance databases).
Proven expertise in hardware-adjacent programming (C/C++, DLang, Java) and system-level design.
Demonstrated ability to work across full-stack and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker).
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware architecture.
Limited exposure to deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture (preferred qualifications).
Education and experience skew toward software engineering rather than hardware/performance architecture for AI accelerators.

key_factors.factor: SoC/IP modeling and performance optimization for deep-learning workloads
Hardware-software co-design and GPU/SIMD architecture knowledge
